title: corydalis cashmeriana var. longicalcarata
intro: Corydalis cashmeriana var. longicalcarata, also known as Himalayan corydalis, is a plant species belonging to the poppy family (Papaveraceae), native to the Himalayan regions. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and anticonvulsant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as alleviating pain, reducing anxiety and stress, and improving sleep quality. Corydalis cashmeriana var. longicalcarata is often used in herbal preparations, including extracts, tinctures, and capsules, to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
